ErrorMessage: The "Active Until" date cannot be before the "Active From" date.

ErrorConditionFormula:
AND(
    OR(
        $Permission.WOD_2__DisableSkipTriggerNValidation,
        NOT($Permission.WOD_2__SkipTriggerNValidations)
    ),

    NOT(ISBLANK(WOD_2__Dealer__c)),

    OR(
        ISPICKVAL(WOD_2__Dealer__r.Status__c, "Active") = FALSE,
        ISPICKVAL(WOD_2__Dealer__r.WOD_2__Warranty_Account_Type__c, "Dealer") = FALSE
    )
)
ErrorMessage:
The selected Dealer is either Inactive, or the Warranty Account Type is not set to ‘Dealer’. 
Please update the Account details or select a valid Dealer Account.
The Labor Rate must be greater than zero.
The Travel Rate must be greater than zero.
